description: During a mock FDA inspection of the Phase II Diabetes Trial (DM-TRIAL-2024), a corrected blood pressure reading for subject DM-101 was flagged. Using the OpenClinica web interface (Login: root / Admin123!), document the audit history for the 'Systolic BP' field in the 'Vital Signs' CRF of the 'Baseline Assessment' event. Extract the original value, current value, the username who made the change, and the reason for the change to /home/ga/Documents/audit_findings.txt. Administratively lock the DM-101 Baseline Assessment event to prevent further tampering.
